name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
ℹ️ Pokémon Battle RPG Bot

Tap /start to open the menu, then pick what you want from the buttons.

• 📖 Pokédex — Browse all Pokémon species
• ⚔️ Gym — Challenge gym leaders for badges
• 👥 Team — Manage your party and moves
• 🏟️ Duel — Battle other trainers

Everything is button-driven — just tap to play!

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
